message:
feat(pipelines): implement Pipeline and Workflow Engine

Add comprehensive pipeline orchestration system with:
- Pipeline and step models supporting agent_task, conditional,
  parallel, approval, and script step types
- Execution engine with retry logic, checkpoint/resume, and
  context variable substitution
- REST API endpoints for CRUD, run/pause/resume/cancel operations
- Support for multiple trigger types (manual, schedule, webhook, bead_event)
- 47 passing tests covering service and route functionality

Closes flywheel_private-sj5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
